title: Rollback latest pricing/formula change and restore correct calculation outputs

requirements.text: Stop using the backend-calculated result for Intrinsic Price and Actual Value outputs, and always compute both outputs using the existing frontend calculation functions (calculateIntrinsicPrice and calculateActualValue) so the displayed results match the previously-correct formula behavior.

quotes: Kindly undo the formula latest formula generated result totally wrong.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking “Intrinsic Price” always uses calculateIntrinsicPrice(inputs) to compute the value, regardless of whether backendResult exists.
Clicking “Actual Value” always uses calculateActualValue(inputs) to compute the value, regardless of whether backendResult exists.
The UI no longer shows the '✓ Calculated by backend' indicator in ResultsSection when rendering the result (since backend is no longer used for the displayed values).

requirements.text: Update the developer verification check flow to validate the restored frontend formulas (not backend-derived values), so running the dev check reflects the rolled-back calculation logic.

quotes: Kindly undo the formula latest formula generated result totally wrong.

acceptanceCriteria: runDevCheck no longer derives AA/BB/CC/DD or Intrinsic/Actual from backendResult fields.
Dev check results are computed from the same frontend formulas used for display (calculateHiddenValues / calculateIntrinsicPrice / calculateActualValue).
The dev check UI action (Run Dev Check) continues to function in development mode without requiring backend results.

requirements.text: Ensure the backend calculation request does not block or degrade the user experience after the rollback (e.g., remove/disable backend loading and error UI states that are only relevant when backend results drive the displayed outputs).

quotes: Kindly undo the formula latest formula generated result totally wrong.

acceptanceCriteria: ResultsSection does not show a blocking “Calculating values from backend...” loading card when the user clicks Intrinsic Price or Actual Value.
Backend query errors (if any) do not prevent the frontend formulas from producing results.
No regressions to the existing input form and action buttons behavior (Use Example, Reset, Copy Shareable Link).

constraints: Use English for any user-facing text.

Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or anything inside frontend/src/components/ui (compose them instead).
Backend remains single-actor (backend/main.mo); no new backend services.
nonGoals: Do not introduce new pricing/formula logic beyond restoring the prior correct behavior.
Do not add new authentication methods beyond Internet Identity.
Do not implement new sensitivity analysis or CSV export features.
